name: claude-workspace-bridge
description: Symlink bridge that exposes Claude Code workspace assets to Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Uses symlinks to expose Claude Code workspace skills to Codex.
interface.longDescription: Repo-local Codex plugin that reuses the existing Claude Code workspace assets by symlinking .agent/skills and mirroring the MCP entries declared in .claude/settings.local.json.
defaultPrompt: Use a skill from the symlinked Claude workspace.
Use Context7 before framework code changes.
Use Tavily when external research is required.
